hero.lead: A curated selection of living spaces carved from the Costa Rican canopy. Each suite is an invitation to witness the pulse of the jungle from a vantage of absolute serenity.
hero.imageAlt: Luxurious jungle villa pool overlooking dense tropical rainforest canopy at sunset

canopy.imageAlt: Modern suite with wood balconies on a misty tropical mountainside, dense green forest and soft overcast light
canopy.title: Canopy Master Suite
canopy.description: Suspended thirty feet above the forest floor, the Canopy Master Suite offers a panoramic perspective of the Golfo Dulce. Features reclaimed teak flooring and a private terrace that blends seamlessly with the surrounding flora.

garden.imageAlt: Modern luxury bathroom with stone soaking tub and tropical garden view
garden.title: Garden Villa
garden.description: Grounded in the lush soil of our private botanical reserve, the Garden Villa is designed for deep rejuvenation. The open-air layout allows the evening breeze and the scent of wild jasmine to permeate your living space.

treehouse.description: The ultimate immersive experience. Built around a centuries-old Ceiba tree, this multi-level dwelling offers total seclusion and an unmatched connection to the rainforest ecosystem.

highlights.title: Starlight Lounge
highlights.description: Retractable glass roof for celestial viewing from your bed.

highlights.title: Artisan Kitchenette
highlights.description: Stocked daily with local organic fruits and premium Costa Rican coffee.

treehouse.imageAlt: Elevated wooden treehouse on stilts with balcony and doorway, framed by large tropical leaves and dense forest

newsletter.title: The Forest Letter
newsletter.description: Receive seasonal updates, botanical wisdom, and exclusive retreat offerings directly in your inbox.
